Haunted ATX

Choose Your Tour

All five experiences — side by side. Find the one that fits your group, budget, and taste for the paranormal.

Best Value · Public Tour

Public Van Tour

$49 / person

All the haunted history of Austin — with more seats, air conditioning, and a custom art-wrapped van. Perfect for larger groups or anyone who wants the full experience at the best price.

Duration
~3 hrs
Schedule
Tue–Sun, 7:30 PM
Capacity
Up to 10
Type
Public
  • Air conditioned & seats up to 10
  • BYOB — water & sodas provided
  • Clay Pit 2-for-1 entree coupon included
  • Meet at Walter's Tavern, S Congress Ave
Learn More Book Now
Classic Experience · Public Tour

Public Hearse Tour

$99 / person

Ride Austin's haunted streets inside a classic Cadillac hearse converted into a spooky limousine. Intimate groups, full spooky atmosphere, and frequent stops at historic haunted locations.

Duration
~3 hrs
Schedule
Tue–Sun, 7:00 PM
Capacity
Up to 6
Type
Public
  • Intimate groups — ride in an actual hearse
  • BYOB — water & sodas provided
  • Clay Pit 2-for-1 entree coupon included
  • Meet at Walter's Tavern, S Congress Ave
Learn More Book Now
Private · Your Group Only

Private Hearse Tour

From $125 / person
First 2 at $125 · Additional at $79

The whole hearse, reserved exclusively for your group — with custom pickup and drop-off anywhere in downtown Austin. The most personal and flexible ghost tour we offer.

Duration
~3 hrs
Schedule
Tue–Sun, 8:00 PM
Capacity
Up to 6
Type
Private
  • Entire hearse reserved for your group only
  • Custom pickup & drop-off downtown
  • BYOB — water, sodas & ice provided
  • Clay Pit 2-for-1 coupon · Family-friendly option
Learn More Book Now
Hands-On · Public Experience

Paranormal Investigation

$59 / person

Go hands-on with the spirits at The Clay Pit inside The Bertram Building — one of Austin's most historically active paranormal locations. Use professional equipment and try to make contact yourself.

Duration
~2 hrs
Schedule
Saturdays, 10:30 PM
Capacity
Up to 10
Type
Public
  • Professional equipment provided (Spirit Box, EMF, more)
  • Bring your own equipment too
  • Historic Bertram Building (est. 1850s)
  • Clay Pit kitchen & bar open until 10 PM
Learn More Book Now
Private · Your Group Only

Private Paranormal Investigation

From $125 / person
First 2 at $125 · Additional at $79

The full paranormal investigation experience with just your group — no strangers, no shared space. Investigate The Bertram Building on a Friday night with all the same professional equipment, customized for your party.

Duration
~2 hrs
Schedule
Fridays, 10:30 PM
Capacity
Min. 2 guests
Type
Private
  • Entire investigation exclusive to your group
  • Professional equipment provided
  • Flexible size — no fixed maximum
  • Different night? Contact us to arrange
Learn More Book Now

Not sure which tour is right for you?

We're happy to help you find the perfect fit. Drop us a message and we'll point you in the right direction.
